stage.note: Pre-product is in scope. That is the whole point of the Proof Protocol.

geo.note: Deliberately unrestricted. Geographic filters are the cheapest way to systematically miss the Type 6 founder.

risk_appetite.scale: 0 = only fully de-risked traction, 1 = pre-product technical conviction
implications: Zero public signal routes to PROOF_PROTOCOL, never to an automatic pass.
An unverifiable claim is reported as unverifiable. It is not scored as false.
Low visibility is treated as a property of the observer, not of the founder.

ranking_policy.description: Rank by the weakest of the three axes, then by momentum. The axes are never averaged into one number - not here, not in the UI.

hard_filters.description: School, employer brand and investor name are excluded from every scoring input. Invariant #3.
